properties.name: Mahakali/Sharda downstream handoff
properties.label_title: Mahakali/Sharda joins the western Ganges logic
properties.label_subtitle: Western Nepal-origin route enters the Sharda-Ghaghara-Ganges path
properties.strategic_note: Shows where the western Nepal-origin route becomes part of the wider downstream plains system.
properties.map_read_note: Use as an approximate reading marker for route continuity, not as a surveyed confluence point.
properties.source_method: Curated strategic marker aligned to the generated HydroRIVERS downstream route.

properties.name: Ghaghara-Ganges merge
properties.label_subtitle: Karnali's downstream route becomes a major Ganges tributary path
properties.strategic_note: Marks the western and far-western Nepal-linked routes joining the main Ganges downstream story.
properties.map_read_note: Approximate confluence callout used for narrative legibility.
properties.source_method: Curated strategic marker aligned to the generated HydroRIVERS downstream route.

properties.name: Gandak-Ganges merge
properties.label_subtitle: Central Nepal-origin flow path meets the lower Ganges corridor
properties.strategic_note: Connects the Gandaki-Narayani-Gandak system to the dense Bihar/Ganges corridor.
properties.map_read_note: Approximate confluence callout used for narrative legibility.
properties.source_method: Curated strategic marker aligned to the generated HydroRIVERS downstream route.

properties.name: Kosi-Ganges merge
properties.label_subtitle: Eastern Nepal-origin route reaches the lower Ganges corridor
properties.strategic_note: Frames the Kosi as the eastern Nepal-origin system entering the shared Ganges path.
properties.map_read_note: Approximate confluence callout used for narrative legibility.
properties.source_method: Curated strategic marker aligned to the generated HydroRIVERS downstream route.

properties.name: Ganges-Padma transition
properties.label_subtitle: The shared downstream trunk enters Bangladesh naming and delta logic
properties.strategic_note: Shows the transition from northern India river politics into Bangladesh delta dependence.
properties.map_read_note: Approximate transition marker for reading the route across the border.
properties.source_method: Curated strategic marker aligned to the generated HydroRIVERS downstream route.

properties.name: Padma-Meghna delta merge
properties.label_title: Padma and Meghna converge in the delta
properties.label_subtitle: The Nepal-linked routes are now part of the lower delta system
properties.strategic_note: Marks the delta convergence where upstream timing, sediment, flood, and dry-season stories accumulate.
properties.map_read_note: Approximate delta merge marker; v1 does not map dense distributaries.
properties.source_method: Curated strategic marker aligned to the generated HydroRIVERS downstream terminal reach.

properties.name: Bay of Bengal terminal reach
properties.label_subtitle: HydroRIVERS terminal reach for the strategic route trace
properties.strategic_note: Final mapped terminal for the route-to-ocean layer.
properties.map_read_note: Represents the generated terminal reach, not detailed tidal or distributary geography.
